name: images_create
description: Generate images from text prompts using open-source diffusion models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion XL. Supports configurable resolution, steps, negative prompts, LoRA adapters, and seed for reproducibility.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The image generation model to use.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: A description of the desired image.
parameters.example: A cartoon of an astronaut riding a horse on the moon

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Number of generation steps. Default is 20.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of images to generate. Default is 1.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what the image should not contain.

parameters.name: guidance_scale
parameters.description: Controls prompt alignment. Higher values produce images more faithful to the prompt. Default is 3.5.

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: URL of input image for models supporting image-to-image generation.

parameters.name: image_loras
parameters.description: Array of LoRA objects with 'path' and 'scale' properties.

body.prompt: A cartoon of an astronaut riding a horse on the moon
